title: aquarius glaucus
intro: Aquarius glaucus, also known as the Sea Holly or Eryngium maritimum, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Aquarius glaucus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Aquarius glaucus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
